reviews.review_msg: Ridiculously easy. Papers and assignments are given full credit just for being grammatical and making sense. Exam questions are given in advance and the answers are directly out of the lecture notes. There's no reason to read the book or attend class. Hardly any material. Whole course could be taught in 4 weeks.

Unclear with exam expectations. Seems easy because you get the questions before the exam. The class has concluded that she decides your mark based on drawing marks from a hat. Totally random. Does not explain things well.

Took this in Fall this year. Suzanne is a very knowledgeable professor, however, her course is quite heavy with lots of homework. Just make sure you have enough time because you need to submit multiple assignments every week!

The assignments were graded without any criteria and without much explanation in class or on canvas. If a university professor or an authoritative scholar in linguistics fails to meet the care and compassion of a student, it is better to retake the education course. A bit of the basic qualities and standards of teachers are not there.

Professor Hilgendorf was amazing. Admittedly, this course (Sociolinguistics)  is her specialty, so I expected nothing short of spectacular which she delivered. This class was writing intensive and her expectations were very clear and she took alot of time to help us meet that expectation. Amazing lecturer. Willing and available for help.
